Short Title and Commencement.- (1) This Order may be called the Tea (Distribution and Export) Control (Amendment) Order, 2016. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Tea (Distribution and Export) Control Order, 2005,- (a) in paragraph 2, for the word "Chairman", wherever it occurs, the words "Deputy Chairman" shall be substituted; (b) in Forms F, H and I, for the word "Chairman", the words "Deputy Chairman" shall be substituted. [F.No.T-12012/l/2016(Plant-A)Pt.-Il ALOK VARDHAN CHATURVEDI, Addl. Secy. Note : The principal order was published vide S.O. No. 486(E), dated 1.4.2005 in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II. Section 3, Sub-section (ii). •• -- 2 of 2 --
